revision.comment: leave the demo to the docs, which illustrates poems better
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Blockquote
|text={{#if:{{{text|}}}{{{quote|}}}{{{quotetext|}}}{{{content|}}}{{{1|}}}|{{#tag:poem|{{if empty|{{{text|}}}|{{{quote|}}}|{{{quotetext|}}}|{{{content|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
|char={{{char|{{{character|}}}}}}
|2={{{2|}}}
|author={{{author|}}}
|by={{{by|}}}
|cite={{{cite|}}}
|personquoted={{{personquoted|}}}
|sign={{{sign|}}}
|3={{{3|}}}
|publication={{{publication|}}}
|quotesource={{{quotesource|}}}
|source={{{source|}}}
|title={{{title|}}}
|ts={{{ts|}}}
|style={{{style|}}}
|4={{{4|}}}
|5={{{5|}}}
|class={{{class|}}}
|id={{{id|}}}
|diff={{{diff|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Blockquote
|text={{#if:{{{text|}}}{{{quote|}}}{{{quotetext|}}}{{{content|}}}{{{1|}}}|{{#tag:poem|{{if empty|{{{text|}}}|{{{quote|}}}|{{{quotetext|}}}|{{{content|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
|char={{{char|{{{character|}}}}}}
|2={{{2|}}}
|author={{{author|}}}
|by={{{by|}}}
|cite={{{cite|}}}
|personquoted={{{personquoted|}}}
|sign={{{sign|}}}
|3={{{3|}}}
|publication={{{publication|}}}
|quotesource={{{quotesource|}}}
|source={{{source|}}}
|title={{{title|}}}
|ts={{{ts|}}}
|style={{{style|}}}
|4={{{4|}}}
|5={{{5|}}}
|class={{{class|}}}
|id={{{id|}}}
|diff={{{diff|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Blockquote
|text={{#if:{{{text|}}}{{{quote|}}}{{{quotetext|}}}{{{content|}}}{{{1|}}}|{{#tag:poem|{{if empty|{{{text|}}}|{{{quote|}}}|{{{quotetext|}}}|{{{content|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
|char={{{char|{{{character|}}}}}}
|2={{{2|}}}
|author={{{author|}}}
|by={{{by|}}}
|cite={{{cite|}}}
|personquoted={{{personquoted|}}}
|sign={{{sign|}}}
|3={{{3|}}}
|publication={{{publication|}}}
|quotesource={{{quotesource|}}}
|source={{{source|}}}
|title={{{title|}}}
|ts={{{ts|}}}
|style={{{style|}}}
|4={{{4|}}}
|5={{{5|}}}
|class={{{class|}}}
|id={{{id|}}}
|diff={{{diff|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Blockquote
|text={{#if:{{{text|}}}{{{quote|}}}{{{quotetext|}}}{{{content|}}}{{{1|}}}|{{#tag:poem|{{if empty|{{{text|}}}|{{{quote|}}}|{{{quotetext|}}}|{{{content|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}

|2={{{2|}}}

|by={{{by|}}}
|cite={{{cite|}}}
|personquoted={{{personquoted|}}}
|sign={{{sign|}}}

|quotesource={{{quotesource|}}}
|source={{{source|}}}
|title={{{title|}}}
|ts={{{ts|}}}
|style={{{style|}}}
|4={{{4|}}}
|5={{{5|}}}
|class={{{class|}}}
|id={{{id|}}}
|diff={{{diff|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Blockquote
|text={{#if:{{{text|}}}{{{quote|}}}{{{quotetext|}}}{{{content|}}}{{{1|}}}|{{#tag:poem|{{if empty|{{{text|}}}|{{{quote|}}}|{{{quotetext|}}}|{{{content|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
|char={{{char|{{{character|}}}}}}
|2={{{2|}}}
|author={{{author|}}}
|by={{{by|}}}
|cite={{{cite|}}}
|personquoted={{{personquoted|}}}
|sign={{{sign|}}}
|3={{{3|}}}
|publication={{{publication|}}}
|quotesource={{{quotesource|}}}
|source={{{source|}}}
|title={{{title|}}}
|ts={{{ts|}}}
|style={{{style|}}}
|4={{{4|}}}
|5={{{5|}}}
|class={{{class|}}}
|id={{{id|}}}
|diff={{{diff|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23525408989|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Blockquote
|text={{#if:{{{text|}}}{{{quote|}}}{{{quotetext|}}}{{{content|}}}{{{1|}}}|{{#tag:poem|{{if empty|{{{text|}}}|{{{quote|}}}|{{{quotetext|}}}|{{{content|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}
|char={{{char|{{{character|}}}}}}
|2={{{2|}}}
|author={{{author|}}}
|by={{{by|}}}
|cite={{{cite|}}}
|personquoted={{{personquoted|}}}
|sign={{{sign|}}}
|3={{{3|}}}
|publication={{{publication|}}}
|quotesource={{{quotesource|}}}
|source={{{source|}}}
|title={{{title|}}}
|ts={{{ts|}}}
|style={{{style|}}}
|4={{{4|}}}
|5={{{5|}}}
|class={{{class|}}}
|id={{{id|}}}
|diff={{{diff|}}}
}}</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}<!-- Add categories to the /doc subpage, not here! -->
</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Blockquote
|text={{#if:{{{text|}}}{{{quote|}}}{{{quotetext|}}}{{{content|}}}{{{1|}}}|{{#tag:poem|{{if empty|{{{text|}}}|{{{quote|}}}|{{{quotetext|}}}|{{{content|}}}|{{{1|}}}}}}}}}

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24957526818|time triggered pipeline]]
